Title: User adds a device successfully
Test Data: Device name = "NewDevice3", Device title = "New Device Title 3"
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Enter "NewDevice3" as the device name
3. Enter "New Device Title 3" as the device title
4. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should be added successfully.

Title: User fails to add a device due to invalid input
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Leave the device name and title fields empty
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should not be added, and appropriate error messages should be displayed.

Title: User enters invalid device name
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Enter "12345" as the device name
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should not be added, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: User enters invalid device title
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Enter "!" as the device title
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should not be added, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: User enters empty device name
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Enter "" as the device name
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should not be added, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: User enters empty device title
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Devices"
2. Enter "" as the device title
3. Submit the form
Expected Result: The device should not be added, and an appropriate error message should be displayed.
